title: Tunisian Eggplant Tagine
description: A hearty and flavorful tagine made with eggplant, peas, and a blend of Tunisian spices.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large clay or ceramic pot over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the sliced eggplant and cook for 3-4 minutes, until softened.
Add the fresh peas, ground cumin, coriander, and smoked paprika. Stir to combine.
Add the Tunisian spice blend and stir to combine.
Pour in 1 cup of water and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and cook, covered, for 20-25 minutes, until the eggplant is tender.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley if desired.
